description: Foundry/MCP-ready tool definitions backed by governed Python W-2 agent workers.

tools.name: run_w2_pipeline
tools.description: Run the complete W-2 intake, extraction, validation, review, tax mapping, compliance, and persistence pipeline.

tools.name: start_w2_pipeline
tools.description: Create initial orchestration state for a W-2 intake event.

tools.name: process_w2_intake
tools.description: Accept an already-uploaded W-2 document event and return the extraction routing metadata.

tools.name: extract_w2_document
tools.description: Extract normalized W-2 data from the uploaded document using local or Azure Document Intelligence mode.

tools.name: validate_w2_facts
tools.description: Validate extracted W-2 facts and decide whether human review is required.

tools.name: submit_w2_human_review
tools.description: Create or route a human review packet for validation failures or low-confidence extraction.

tools.name: map_w2_tax_facts
tools.description: Map W-2 data to 1040-ready fields and reusable tax planning facts.

tools.name: generate_form_1040_document
tools.description: Generate a draft Form 1040 document artifact from mapped W-2 tax facts.

tools.name: evaluate_w2_compliance
tools.description: Evaluate compliance controls for extraction, mapping, generated 1040 artifacts, and audit evidence.

tools.name: persist_w2_pipeline_checkpoint
tools.description: Persist a governed pipeline checkpoint for resume, audit, and downstream tax planning.

tools.name: persist_completed_w2_pipeline
tools.description: Persist the governed final pipeline state.

tools.name: get_runtime_configuration
tools.description: Return non-secret runtime settings used by the W-2 orchestration.
